title: Debt/Overspending Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DEBTORS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 12-step program for people who want to stop incurring unsecured debt. Unsecured debt is money that people borrow without promising to give up something (like a house or car) if they cannot pay it back. Offers face-to-face, phone, and internet meetings. Website provides a search tool for finding local in-person meetings. Website Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies (800) 421-2383 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
